Article.ArticleTitle: Gelatin production from red tilapia skin fish using high-pressure processing and its characterisations.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: International Halal Research Centre, Universitas Negeri Padang, Padang, West Sumatera, Indonesia. irwandi@iium.edu.my.
